headline: Goldman Sachs Upgrades Williams-Sonoma to Buy After a 14% Pullback From February Highs
summary: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) stock is up roughly 2% in early Monday trading, touching $192 after Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) stock upgraded the shares to Buy from Neutral this morning. The catalyst is a fresh price target of $218, raised from $185, implying roughly 14% upside from current levels. The upgrade follows a roughly 12% pullback from the ... Goldman Sachs Upgrades Williams-Sonoma to Buy After a 14% Pullback From February Highs
